title: Refractory Hypoxemia - ARDS
chief_complaint: 45-year-old admitted for severe pneumonia, now intubated with worsening oxygenation despite increasing FiO2 and PEEP.

hidden_data.abg: pH: 7.28, PaO2: 52, PaCO2: 55, HCO3: 18, P/F ratio: 65
hidden_data.echo: Normal LV function, no cardiogenic edema

key_learning_points: Berlin criteria: acute onset, bilateral infiltrates, non-cardiogenic, P/F ratio

feedback.correct_message: Excellent! Severe ARDS with P/F ratio <100.
feedback.incorrect_message: This is severe ARDS. The P/F ratio of 65 confirms it.
feedback.attending_note: Severe ARDS: Low tidal volume (6mL/kg), plateau pressure <30, prone positioning for >16h/day, conservative fluids, consider neuromuscular blockade. P/F ratio <100 = severe per Berlin criteria.
